parsed.availability_comment: Signed by RCB for IPL 2026 and no recent adverse availability report found.
parsed.availability_note: No injury/suspension/tournament-conflict signal found; domestic player profile supports near-full availability.
parsed.followup_reason: Availability looks clean, but first-choice XI status remains unresolved until closer-to-match team news or opening team sheet.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Selection pressure is role-based within a deep RCB top/middle-order, not overseas-slot pressure.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas-slot cap does not affect him. Competition is for batting-balance and seam-all-rounder utility spots.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: RCB invested in him as a flexible Indian all-rounder, but recent expert previews still question whether he starts in the first-choice XI immediately.
